Information.Description: 5-Methoxypsoralen with ultraviolet A therapy can cause cancer according to an independent committee of scientific and health experts.
Information.DescriptionSourceName: California Office of Environmental Health Hazard Assessment (OEHHA)

Information.Description: 5-methoxypsoralen is a 5-methoxyfurocoumarin that is psoralen substituted by a methoxy group at position 5. It has a role as a hepatoprotective agent and a plant metabolite. It is a member of psoralens, an organic heterotricyclic compound and a 5-methoxyfurocoumarin. It is functionally related to a psoralen.
